original_statement: which year the czech republic compete in the olympics and finish best?
mutated_statement: which year the country do something in the event and end up best?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action de‑lexicalization + Event generalization + Paraphrase: "the czech republic"→"the country" (specific entity→generic) | "compete"→"do something" (specific verb→vague placeholder) | "the olympics"→"the event" (specific event→generic) | "finish best"→"end up best" (phrasing synonym/paraphrase)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别的关键信息为：代理直接列举并扫描了名次（6th, 5th, …, 3rd），并断定“最佳”为2014年（World Indoor Championships），judge_thought明确给出2014作为答案。代理的具体表现是没有在任何位置提及问题模糊性、未请求澄清或声明信息不足，而是按照自己的理解直接处理并得出具体年份。因而符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义：代理未表现出对目标不明确的认知，直接给出确定性答案，即归类为该类别。
